panel_placement.rationale: The kline card already carried the designated 個人合理區間試算 placeholder seam (status 未計算); both the worksheet (current-price comparison) and the price/volume indicators need the admitted-price context of the selected instrument, so the market view is the minimal-intrusion placement. 財務追蹤 stays untouched because official fundamentals remain unavailable pending C1 source admission.

trade_offs: Tauri command pair for worksheet persistence deliberately not added (no Rust change; keeps the p4 Tauri audit surface untouched); localStorage path only. Follow-up: desktop load/save commands mirroring load_alerts/save_alerts.

tests/test_k4_kline_ui_contract.py tokens updated from the retired placeholder panel (valuation-eps/pe-low/pe-high/safety-margin, 尚未套用個人計算規則) to the approved panel tokens (valuation-form/valuation-ws-model/valuation-indicators/valuation-evaluate, 使用者假設, 不構成投資建議); the placeholder was explicitly a 未計算 stub that this work-unit replaces.

Market pixel baselines updated after screenshot self-review (1440 crop of the new panel and 390px capture reviewed); model select options shortened to plain model names to fix container-overflow at 1280/1024 found by the RWD audit.
valuationInputs state and SET_VALUATION_INPUT reducer action kept for backward compatibility though the new panel does not use them.

dashboard_core_tests.result: pass, checks include valuation-analysis and form-issues

alerts_smoke.form_feedback_checks: added 2026-07-22: watchlist_form_issues_visible_when_disabled, watchlist_group_issues_hidden_when_valid, watchlist_add_issues_hidden_when_selected, alert_form_issues_visible_when_disabled, alert_form_issues_narrow_as_fields_fix, alert_form_issues_hidden_when_valid, valuation_form_issues_visible_when_disabled, terminal_watchlist_add_issues_visible, engine_rejection_shown_verbatim

browser_smoke.screenshot_self_review: 2026-07-22: every PNG in outputs/dashboard-browser/ reviewed; the only diffs are the intended amber .form-issues hint lists under the disabled form buttons (alerts, valuation, watchlist toolbars on market/products/overview, plus the detail-dialog backdrop page). financial_tracker and formula_builder hashes unchanged.

rwd_audit.result: 0 failures across all nine views x six breakpoints; worst_top10 carries only the 9 intentional 720px breadcrumb clips; re-audited 2026-07-22 after the .form-issues addition with no new failures

form_feedback.follow_up: User requirement recorded below under human_acceptance.follow_up_requirement: every button disabled (or submission rejected) because an input fails a rule must show a visible field-level hint naming the field and the expected format/range.
form_feedback.pattern: Shared issue-list pattern: pure functions in ui/dashboard/dashboard-core.js (alertFormIssues, valuationFormIssues, watchlistGroupNameIssues, watchlistAddIssues) return [{field, message}] with Chinese messages mirroring the engine fail-closed validators (alerts.py validate_alert, valuation.py validate_worksheet) and reducer guards; app.js renders them via formIssuesMarkup into a shared .form-issues list next to the button and refreshes them live via refreshFormIssues in the input/change handlers (no full re-render while typing); add-button disabled state is driven by issues.length.
covered_forms: alerts panel add form (market view): target/label/value/cooldownSeconds/until
valuation worksheet add form (market view): target/label/eps/targetPe/dps/growthRate/discountRate/growthPct/peg/safetyMargin, including the r > g rule
watchlist create-group (products view): non-blank group name
watchlist add-to-list (products view + market terminal compact watchlist): search query, exact-match selection, already-in-group
form_feedback.engine_rejection_passthrough: Engine/sidecar rejections discovered only at evaluation time (e.g. r<=g reaching the sidecar from a stored worksheet) are shown verbatim in the existing status line via engineErrorMessage; engine messages already name field and rule and the fail-closed 400 path is unchanged. Click-path rejections in addAlertFromDraft/addWorksheetFromDraft now dispatch the field-level issue summary to the status line instead of failing silently or with one generic message.
form_feedback.style: styles.css .form-issues: var(--type-helper) 12px, var(--warning) text, no background/border, grid-spanning, hidden when the button is enabled; rule recorded in .agents/skills/uiux-review/SKILL.md (Form rejection feedback, TQR-FORM-FEEDBACK).
form_feedback.verification: tests/dashboard-core.test.cjs form-issues cases (valid -> empty list; each invalid class -> field-specific message); scripts/dashboard-alerts-smoke.cjs nine new browser checks (hints visible while disabled, narrow as fields fix, hidden when valid, verbatim engine rejection); full offline_verification suite re-run green on 2026-07-22.

acceptance_notes: All nine work-unit slices implemented; no order, simulated-order, credential, or provider code path exists in the new module (source-scan test included).
All valuation inputs are user-supplied assumptions labelled draft/user_supplied_assumption at schema, storage, and render layers; official fundamentals are not auto-populated.
Comparison output is a research note only (research_comparison_only=true), with no investment-advice or solicitation language in the UI copy.
Indicators use admitted EOD data only: raw close basis, z-score with population standard deviation and explicit recorded period.

Follow-up completed 2026-07-22: field-level form rejection feedback (form_feedback block above) — every rule-disabled button on the alerts, valuation, and watchlist forms now shows which field is wrong and the expected format; engine rejections surface verbatim. status stays pass per the user's instruction; human spot-check of the new hints is at the user's discretion.
Human acceptance is still required before this capability can be considered activated; capability 2 (delayed feed) remains approved_next.

human_acceptance.environment: browser dev preview via scripts/serve_dashboard_app.py, sidecar 127.0.0.1:8767
human_acceptance.follow_up_requirement: User requires visible field-level validation feedback on every form rejection (which field is wrong and the expected format), across all pages. Tracked as a new work item before capability 5 is considered fully polished.
human_acceptance.follow_up_form_feedback: Completed 2026-07-22; see the form_feedback block above. Covers alerts/valuation/watchlist forms, engine rejection verbatim passthrough, smoke + unit coverage, and the uiux-review skill rule.
